comparison_surface_note: Compares official Login clientbound hello framed packet id and body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: ClientboundHelloPacket(String, byte[], byte[], boolean), ClientboundHelloPacket.STREAM_CODEC, LoginProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundHelloPacket), LoginProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ClientboundHelloPacket.getServerId(), getChallenge(), shouldAuthenticate(), private publicKey field, ClientLoginPacketListener.handleHello(ClientboundHelloPacket)

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Login clientbound hello framed dispatch/decode; not encryption success, authentication success, key validation, login state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Login clientbound hello packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty serverId/publicKey/challenge and shouldAuthenticate=false fixture only; it does not prove encryption success, authentication success, key validation, login state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
